channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Oracle’s HR software now has AI to help with taxes and career planning
item.description: Oracle’s new AI will answer employee questions about everything job-related, from hiring to retiring. Oracle has embedded artificial intelligence capabilities into its Human Capital Management software with the intention of optimizing workplace productivity, the company announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Jocelyn Mintz, Fast Company

item.title: Using NATS with .NET Aspire
item.description: If you’re building a cloud-native application using a scalable cluster of microservices, you’re going to need a way for those services to communicate.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Empowering Women in AI: Leading innovation in the UAE
item.description: In recent years, the role of women in the field of Artificial Intelligence has steadily increased, with a particularly notable surge in the UAE.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: In a time crunch? 3 ways GenAI can come through in a clutch
item.description: In just a couple of years, generative AI (GenAI) has made a big impact on the way people, companies, and entire industries think about work. It’s helping doctors and nurses, who spend more than a third of their work week on paperwork, free up more time to focus on patients.
item.dc:creator: AJ Shankar, Fast Company

item.title: OM System’s new OM-3 is the stunning retro Pen-F reboot and Fujifilm rival we needed
item.description: The rugged new OM System OM-3 mirrorless camera is a true retro beauty with new creative dial and modern features, including computational photography modes.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: AI might run your next employee training
item.description: It’s almost become cliche for employers to express concern about Gen Z’s lack of training in the social skills necessary for life in the office.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Google scraps its diversity hiring goals as it complies with Trump's new government contractor rules
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google is scrapping some of its diversity hiring targets, joining a lengthening list of U.S. companies that have abandoned or scaled back their diversity, equity and inclusion programs.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: A wedding necklace and Polish dumplings will be part of a mission to the International Space Station
item.description: What do a wedding necklace, Polish savory dumplings and a photo of Hungary’s first astronaut have in common.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Adobe Acrobat AI Assistant Adds Contract Intelligence Feature
item.description: Adobe updates its Acrobat AI Assistant with a new contract intelligence feature, helping users understand complex contractual information in PDF files.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Apple lashes out at iPhone porn app maker and the EU rules allowing its download
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple has chided a newly introduced pornography app available in the European Union, warning that the bloc’s digital rules opening the way for third-party app store downloads undermines consumer confidence in the tech giant.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Judge says Elon Musk's claims of harm from OpenAI are a 'stretch' but welcomes possible trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Elon Musk's lawyers faced off with OpenAI in court Tuesday as a federal judge weighed the billionaire's request for a court order that would block the ChatGPT maker from converting itself to a for-profit company. U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Google's rising holiday's season ad sales aren't enough to ease worries about AI letdown
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google's digital ad sales continued to grow at a healthy clip during the holiday season, but that wasn't enough to offset investors' worries about whether its big bet on artificial intelligence will be lucrative as once envisioned.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Meta promises it won’t release dangerous AI systems
item.description: According to a new policy document from Meta, the Frontier AI Framework, the company might not release AI systems developed in-house in certain risky scenarios. The document defines two types of AI systems that can be classified as either “high risk” or “critical risk.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Bill Gates: Musk wouldn't be telling USAID workers to stay home if he knew what it does
item.description: Billionaire Bill Gates said in an interview early Tuesday that Elon Musk "wouldn't be telling" employees at the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) not to come to work if he "really knew" what it does. “I give billions of dollars to the same thing that USAID does.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Rising crypto popularity sparks surge in scams: Avoid falling prey
item.description: As cryptocurrency gains popularity, it also becomes a prime target for scammers, making it crucial to take precautions and avoid falling prey to scams.
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Joyce, NewsNation

item.title: How to easily transfer files and photos off a computer to your hard drive
item.description: It's not just about freeing up space on your computer, Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says. It's about protecting your digital memories and important documents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DeepSeek
item.description: DeepSeek, founded in 2023 by Liang Wenfeng, a Chinese entrepreneur, engineer and former hedge fund manager, is generating a lot of buzz — and for good reason. Here are five things that make it stand out (as well as a listing of the latest news and analysis about DeepSeek).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: SoftBank and OpenAI set up joint company to push artificial intelligence services
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese technology giant SoftBank Group and OpenAI stepped up their AI partnership Monday, setting up a 50-50 held company called SB OpenAI Japan.
item.dc:creator: YURI KAGEYAMA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Microsoft AI investments cause cloud operating income growth to plunge
item.description: Microsoft reported strong earnings on Wednesday, but growth in profits in its intelligent cloud segment is slowing despite booming demand for AI infrastructure. It reported revenue of $25.5 billion in its intelligent cloud segment, around 37% of its total revenue, in the three months to Dec.
item.dc:creator: Network World
